data.name: Grandma's House: College Days
data.detailed_description: Dive into Grandma's House: College Days, a cheeky adult kinetic novel offering a light-hearted romp through college life, evoking chuckles more than challenges. As the main character, stumble through a series of amusing, mildly risqué escapades amidst a backdrop of casual college camaraderie. With a sprinkle of humor and a dash of romance, this game serves as a whimsical prelude to the Grandma's House saga, setting a playful stage for the escapades that follow. It's a small slice of light-hearted fun, nothing more, nothing less—perfect for a casual, comedic diversion from the daily grind.
data.about_the_game: Dive into Grandma's House: College Days, a cheeky adult kinetic novel offering a light-hearted romp through college life, evoking chuckles more than challenges. As the main character, stumble through a series of amusing, mildly risqué escapades amidst a backdrop of casual college camaraderie. With a sprinkle of humor and a dash of romance, this game serves as a whimsical prelude to the Grandma's House saga, setting a playful stage for the escapades that follow. It's a small slice of light-hearted fun, nothing more, nothing less—perfect for a casual, comedic diversion from the daily grind.
data.short_description: MC goes back to college and has some sex. Your standard cookie-cutter college game with all the staples you've come to expect like walking down a hallway, sleeping in a dorm room and the classic "banging your bully's girlfriend" scene. A prequel short story to Grandma's House
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
